release_notes:
Horus Web v1.6 — What's New
RTL-SDR Direct Mode — You can now receive signals directly from an RTL-SDR dongle without any external SDR software. Just enable RTL-SDR Direct in the sidebar, set your frequency, gain, PPM offset, bandwidth, and bias tee, and hit Start. No more virtual audio cables or third-party SDR apps required.
Day/Night Shadow on Map — The live map now shows a real-time day/night terminator overlay, so you can see at a glance which areas are in daylight and which are in darkness. Useful for long-duration flights crossing the terminator.
